title: Custom logo on forms
excerpt: We are an agency, and so we want to use our client’s branding when using forms. But at the moment we can only have the monday.com logo or our logo on the form. Can custom logos on forms be a new feature?

posts.author: jenniferhall (Jennifer Hall)
posts.cookedHtml: We are an agency, and so we want to use our client’s branding when using forms. But at the moment we can only have the monday.com logo or our logo on the form. Can custom logos on forms be a new feature?

posts.author: Cmaz (Chris Mazuran)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. We have multiple BUs using our instance all who have a different logo. We need this flexibility.
